title: Data Entry Clerk

rationales.taskAutomation: Keying, transcribing, and reconciling structured data from forms, invoices, and scans is almost entirely automatable end-to-end; only messy exception cases still need a human.
rationales.toolMaturity: OCR, document AI, and agentic data-extraction pipelines are commodity-grade capabilities deployed at scale across enterprise document systems.
rationales.adoption: Large employers across finance, healthcare admin, and logistics have replaced manual entry queues with automated capture as standard practice.
rationales.agenticExposure: Data entry is close to a pure agent spec: ingest, extract, validate, write to system, and flag exceptions, with almost no multi-step judgment required.

tasksAtRisk: Manual keying of forms, invoices, and scanned documents
Database record creation, deduplication, and updates
Routine data validation against source documents
tasksGrowing: Exception handling and edge-case data quality review
Training and correcting AI extraction pipelines
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 43-9021 (Data Entry Keyers), p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: AI Document Intelligence & OCR Pipeline Configuration

insight: Document AI and agentic extraction pipelines now handle the full capture-validate-file loop for structured data, leaving almost no defensible core to this role as historically specified. The realistic path is moving into the exception queue and the pipeline-configuration work that keeps the automation running.
